{{ill|Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} |Rank = Minor Shrine of the Engishiki, Former Township Shrine |Foundation = Unknown |Main Hall = Nagare-zukuri |alternate_name = Osugi-sama, Osuge-sama |Main Festival = July 23–25 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Fukushima |location = {{ill|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (隠津島神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kōriyama|en|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206|lt=Koriyama, Fukushima}}, Konan-machi, along {{ill|Fukushima Prefectural Route 235|ja|福島県道235号羽鳥福良線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefectural Route 235|1=Fukushima Prefectural Road Route 235|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11593474}}. It is identified as one of the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} shrines in {{ill|Mutsu Province|en|Mutsu Province|WD=Q907389|lt=Mutsu Province}}, Asaka District, and recognized as a {{ill|ronsha|ja|論社|1=candidate shrines|2=ja|3=論社|lt=candidate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ronsha|13=User:Immanuelle/candidate shrines|1=Engishiki_Jinmyōchō#Ronsha|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki_Jinmyocho|lt=Ronsha}}}} (shrine of uncertain status). Its former shrine Ranking was {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. Locally, it is affectionately called "Osugi-sama" or "Osuge-sama." == Deities == The shrine enshrines the following deities: * {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島比売命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} * {{ill|Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐理毘売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} == History == According to tradition, the shrine was founded during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}} through a {{ill|Bunrei|en|Bunrei|WD=Q195793|lt=Enshrinement}} from {{ill|Munakata Taisha|en|Munakata Taisha|WD=Q704962|lt=Munakata Taisha}} in {{ill|Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja|筑紫国宇佐郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its sacred grove, spanning approximately 15 hectares, is a dense, primeval forest exuding a mysterious and spiritual ambiance. The area has been designated a {{ill|Natural monument|en|Natural monument|WD=Q23790|lt=Natural Monument}} of Fukushima Prefecture and selected as one of the {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja|福島県緑の百景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The precincts and nearby areas feature sacred sites such as: * '''Eboshiiwa''', a sacred rock * '''Kazaanado''', a subsidiary shrine dedicated to a serpent deity * '''Suge-no-Taki''', a waterfall historically used for purification rituals ({{ill|Misogi|en|Misogi|WD=Q1936265|lt=misogi}}) == Access == The shrine is inaccessible during the winter closure of Fukushima Prefectural Route 235, typically from mid-December to mid-April. - Approx. 1 hour by car from Koriyama Station. - No local bus service is available. The nearest bus stop (Aizu Bus) is approximately 7 km away. == See Also == {{Commonscat|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|ja|隠津島神社 (二本松市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|1=Okitsu Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659061}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市喜久田町堀之内)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|1=Okitsushima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30923269}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)|version=102484926|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] {{Commons category|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} {{wikidata link|Q11659063}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Natural Monuments Designated by Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Koriyama]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed curly braces]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]

[[co:commons:Category:Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)]][[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] [[co:commons:Category:Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)]][[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] [[sn:commons:Category:Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)]][[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] {{Unreferenced| date = November 2024}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Okitsushima Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:隠津島神社（郡山市湖南町）.jpg |location = {{ill|Kōriyama|en|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206|lt=Koriyama, Fukushima}}, Konan-machi Fukura, 7414 Fukura-yama, Fukushima Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|37.334833333333336|N|140.08275|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島比売命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}
{{ill|Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐理毘売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} |Rank = Minor Shrine of the Engishiki, Former Township Shrine |Foundation = Unknown |Main Hall = Nagare-zukuri |alternate_name = Osugi-sama, Osuge-sama |Main Festival = July 23–25 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Fukushima |location = {{ill|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (隠津島神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kōriyama|en|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206|lt=Koriyama, Fukushima}}, Konan-machi, along {{ill|Fukushima Prefectural Route 235|ja|福島県道235号羽鳥福良線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefectural Route 235|1=Fukushima Prefectural Road Route 235|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11593474}}. It is identified as one of the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} shrines in {{ill|Mutsu Province|en|Mutsu Province|WD=Q907389|lt=Mutsu Province}}, Asaka District, and recognized as a {{ill|ronsha|ja|論社|1=candidate shrines|2=ja|3=論社|lt=candidate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ronsha|13=User:Immanuelle/candidate shrines|1=Engishiki_Jinmyōchō#Ronsha|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki_Jinmyocho|lt=Ronsha}}}} (shrine of uncertain status). Its former shrine Ranking was {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. Locally, it is affectionately called "Osugi-sama" or "Osuge-sama." == Deities == The shrine enshrines the following deities: * {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島比売命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} * {{ill|Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐理毘売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} == History == According to tradition, the shrine was founded during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}} through a {{ill|Bunrei|en|Bunrei|WD=Q195793|lt=Enshrinement}} from {{ill|Munakata Taisha|en|Munakata Taisha|WD=Q704962|lt=Munakata Taisha}} in {{ill|Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja|筑紫国宇佐郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its sacred grove, spanning approximately 15 hectares, is a dense, primeval forest exuding a mysterious and spiritual ambiance. The area has been designated a {{ill|Natural monument|en|Natural monument|WD=Q23790|lt=Natural Monument}} of Fukushima Prefecture and selected as one of the {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja|福島県緑の百景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The precincts and nearby areas feature sacred sites such as: * '''Eboshiiwa''', a sacred rock * '''Kazaanado''', a subsidiary shrine dedicated to a serpent deity * '''Suge-no-Taki''', a waterfall historically used for purification rituals ({{ill|Misogi|en|Misogi|WD=Q1936265|lt=misogi}}) == Access == The shrine is inaccessible during the winter closure of Fukushima Prefectural Route 235, typically from mid-December to mid-April. - Approx. 1 hour by car from Koriyama Station. - No local bus service is available. The nearest bus stop (Aizu Bus) is approximately 7 km away. == See Also == {{Commonscat|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|ja|隠津島神社 (二本松市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|1=Okitsu Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659061}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市喜久田町堀之内)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|1=Okitsushima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30923269}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)|version=102484926|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] {{Commons category|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} {{wikidata link|Q11659063}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Natural Monuments Designated by Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Koriyama]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed curly braces]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Qq]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]

Its sacred grove, spanning approximately 15 hectares, is a dense, primeval forest exuding a mysterious and spiritual ambiance. The area has been designated a {{ill|Natural monument|en|Natural monument|WD=Q23790|lt=Natural Monument}} of Fukushima Prefecture and selected as one of the {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja|福島県緑の百景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The precincts and nearby areas feature sacred sites such as: * '''Eboshiiwa''', a sacred rock * '''Kazaanado''', a subsidiary shrine dedicated to a serpent deity * '''Suge-no-Taki''', a waterfall historically used for purification rituals ({{ill|Misogi|en|Misogi|WD=Q1936265|lt=misogi}}) == Access == The shrine is inaccessible during the winter closure of Fukushima Prefectural Route 235, typically from mid-December to mid-April. - Approx. 1 hour by car from Koriyama Station. - No local bus service is available. The nearest bus stop (Aizu Bus) is approximately 7 km away. == See Also == {{Commonscat|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|ja|隠津島神社 (二本松市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|1=Okitsu Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659061}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市喜久田町堀之内)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|1=Okitsushima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30923269}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)|version=102484926|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] {{Commons category|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} {{wikidata link|Q11659063}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Natural Monuments Designated by Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Koriyama]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed curly braces]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:pages]]

{{ill|Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐理毘売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} |Rank = Minor Shrine of the Engishiki, Former Township Shrine |Foundation = Unknown |Main Hall = Nagare-zukuri |alternate_name = Osugi-sama, Osuge-sama |Main Festival = July 23–25 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Fukushima |location = {{ill|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (隠津島神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kōriyama|en|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206|lt=Koriyama, Fukushima}}, Konan-machi, along {{ill|Fukushima Prefectural Route 235|ja|福島県道235号羽鳥福良線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefectural Route 235|1=Fukushima Prefectural Road Route 235|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11593474}}. It is identified as one of the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} shrines in {{ill|Mutsu Province|en|Mutsu Province|WD=Q907389|lt=Mutsu Province}}, Asaka District, and recognized as a {{ill|ronsha|ja|論社|1=candidate shrines|2=ja|3=論社|lt=candidate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ronsha|13=User:Immanuelle/candidate shrines|1=Engishiki_Jinmyōchō#Ronsha|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki_Jinmyocho|lt=Ronsha}}}} (shrine of uncertain status). Its former shrine Ranking was {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. Locally, it is affectionately called "Osugi-sama" or "Osuge-sama." == Deities == The shrine enshrines the following deities: * {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島比売命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} * {{ill|Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐理毘売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} == History == According to tradition, the shrine was founded during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}} through a {{ill|Bunrei|en|Bunrei|WD=Q195793|lt=Enshrinement}} from {{ill|Munakata Taisha|en|Munakata Taisha|WD=Q704962|lt=Munakata Taisha}} in {{ill|Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja|筑紫国宇佐郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its sacred grove, spanning approximately 15 hectares, is a dense, primeval forest exuding a mysterious and spiritual ambiance. The area has been designated a {{ill|Natural monument|en|Natural monument|WD=Q23790|lt=Natural Monument}} of Fukushima Prefecture and selected as one of the {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja|福島県緑の百景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The precincts and nearby areas feature sacred sites such as: * '''Eboshiiwa''', a sacred rock * '''Kazaanado''', a subsidiary shrine dedicated to a serpent deity * '''Suge-no-Taki''', a waterfall historically used for purification rituals ({{ill|Misogi|en|Misogi|WD=Q1936265|lt=misogi}}) == Access == The shrine is inaccessible during the winter closure of Fukushima Prefectural Route 235, typically from mid-December to mid-April. - Approx. 1 hour by car from Koriyama Station. - No local bus service is available. Its former shrine Ranking was {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. Locally, it is affectionately called "Osugi-sama" or "Osuge-sama." == Deities == The shrine enshrines the following deities: * {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島比売命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} * {{ill|Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐理毘売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} == History == According to tradition, the shrine was founded during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}} through a {{ill|Bunrei|en|Bunrei|WD=Q195793|lt=Enshrinement|1=Bunrei}} from {{ill|Munakata Taisha|en|Munakata Taisha|WD=Q704962|lt=Munakata Taisha|1=Munakata Taisha}} in {{ill|Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja|筑紫国宇佐郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its sacred grove, spanning approximately 15 hectares, is a dense, primeval forest exuding a mysterious and spiritual ambiance. The area has been designated a {{ill|Natural monument|en|Natural monument|WD=Q23790|lt=Natural Monument|1=Natural monument}} of Fukushima Prefecture and selected as one of the {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja|福島県緑の百景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The precincts and nearby areas feature sacred sites such as: * '''Eboshiiwa''', a sacred rock * '''Kazaanado''', a subsidiary shrine dedicated to a serpent deity * '''Suge-no-Taki''', a waterfall historically used for purification rituals ({{ill|Misogi|en|Misogi|WD=Q1936265|lt=misogi|1=Misogi}}) == Access == The shrine is inaccessible during the winter closure of Fukushima Prefectural Route 235, typically from mid-December to mid-April. - Approx. 1 hour by car from Koriyama Station. - No local bus service is available. The nearest bus stop (Aizu Bus) is approximately 7 km away. == See Also == {{Commonscat|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|ja|隠津島神社 (二本松市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|1=Okitsu Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659061}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市喜久田町堀之内)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|1=Okitsushima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30923269}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)|version=102484926|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] {{Commons category|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} {{wikidata link|Q11659063}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Natural Monuments Designated by Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Koriyama]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed curly braces]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:pages]]

[[co:commons:Category:Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)]][[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] [[co:commons:Category:Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)]][[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTcommons:Category:Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)]][[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] {{Unreferenced| date = November 2024}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Okitsushima Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:隠津島神社（郡山市湖南町）.jpg |location = {{ill|Kōriyama|en|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206|lt=Koriyama, Fukushima|1=Kōriyama}}, Konan-machi Fukura, 7414 Fukura-yama, Fukushima Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|37.334833333333336|N|140.08275|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島比売命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}

{{ill|Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} |Rank = Minor Shrine of the Engishiki, Former Township Shrine |Foundation = Unknown |Main Hall = Nagare-zukuri |alternate_name = Osugi-sama, Osuge-sama |Main Festival = July 23–25 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Fukushima |location = {{ill|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206|1=Kōriyama}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (隠津島神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kōriyama|en|Kōriyama|WD=Q264206|lt=Koriyama, Fukushima|1=Kōriyama}}, Konan-machi, along {{ill|Fukushima Prefectural Route 235|ja|福島県道235号羽鳥福良線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefectural Route 235|1=Fukushima Prefectural Road Route 235|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11593474}}. It is identified as one of the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} shrines in {{ill|Mutsu Province|en|Mutsu Province|WD=Q907389|lt=Mutsu Province|1=Mutsu Province}}, Asaka District, and recognized as a {{ill|ronsha|ja|論社|1=candidate shrines|2=ja|3=論社|lt=candidate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ronsha|13=User:Immanuelle/candidate shrines|1=Engishiki_Jinmyōchō#Ronsha|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki_Jinmyocho|lt=Ronsha}}}} (shrine of uncertain status). Its former shrine Ranking was {{ill|Gosha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gosha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. Locally, it is affectionately called "Osugi-sama" or "Osuge-sama." == Deities == The shrine enshrines the following deities: * {{ill|Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|市杵島比売命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} * {{ill|Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐理毘売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagirihime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} == History == According to tradition, the shrine was founded during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}} through a {{ill|Bunrei|en|Bunrei|WD=Q195793|lt=Enshrinement|1=Bunrei}} from {{ill|Munakata Taisha|en|Munakata Taisha|WD=Q704962|lt=Munakata Taisha|1=Munakata Taisha}} in {{ill|Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja|筑紫国宇佐郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa District, Tsukushi Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its sacred grove, spanning approximately 15 hectares, is a dense, primeval forest exuding a mysterious and spiritual ambiance. The area has been designated a {{ill|Natural monument|en|Natural monument|WD=Q23790|lt=Natural Monument|1=Natural monument}} of Fukushima Prefecture and selected as one of the {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja|福島県緑の百景|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefecture's Top 100 Greenery|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The precincts and nearby areas feature sacred sites such as: * '''Eboshiiwa''', a sacred rock * '''Kazaanado''', a subsidiary shrine dedicated to a serpent deity * '''Suge-no-Taki''', a waterfall historically used for purification rituals ({{ill|Misogi|en|Misogi|WD=Q1936265|lt=misogi|1=Misogi}}) == Access == The shrine is inaccessible during the winter closure of Fukushima Prefectural Route 235, typically from mid-December to mid-April. - Approx. 1 hour by car from Koriyama Station. - No local bus service is available. The nearest bus stop (Aizu Bus) is approximately 7 km away. == See Also == {{Commonscat|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|ja|隠津島神社 (二本松市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|1=Okitsu Shrine (Nihonmatsu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11659061}} * {{ill|Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市喜久田町堀之内)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsushima Shrine (Koriyama, Kikutada)|1=Okitsushima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30923269}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)|version=102484926|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:隠津島神社 (郡山市湖南町福良)]] {{Commons category|Okitsushima-jinja (Konan-machi, Koriyama)}} {{wikidata link|Q11659063}} [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Natural Monuments Designated by Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Koriyama]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
